widgets.title: Weight Kg Over Tender Date
widgets.description: Trend of total weight in kilograms aggregated by month of tender date.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', "tender_date") AS VARCHAR) AS x, CAST(SUM("weight_kg") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_logistics_shipments" GROUP BY x ORDER BY x ASC LIMIT 500

widgets.title: Weight Kg by Carrier Name
widgets.description: Total shipment weight in kilograms grouped by carrier name.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "carrier_name" AS label, CAST(SUM("weight_kg") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_logistics_shipments" GROUP BY "carrier_name" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Weight Kg Distribution by Service Level
widgets.description: Proportion of total shipment weight in kilograms grouped by service level.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "service_level" AS label, CAST(SUM("weight_kg") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_logistics_shipments" GROUP BY "service_level" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

widgets.title: Carrier Name × Service Level Heatmap
widgets.description: Heatmap showing the count of shipments by carrier name and service level.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "carrier_name" AS row, "service_level" AS col, CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_logistics_shipments" GROUP BY "carrier_name", "service_level" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 400

widgets.title: Carrier Name Composition by Service Level
widgets.description: Stacked bar chart showing the count of shipments per carrier name, broken down by service level.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "carrier_name" AS label, "service_level" AS "group", CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_logistics_shipments" GROUP BY label, "group" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Carrier Name Ranked by Weight Lb
widgets.description: Total shipment weight in pounds aggregated by carrier name, ranked descending.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "carrier_name" AS label, CAST(SUM("weight_lb") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_logistics_shipments" GROUP BY "carrier_name" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Weight Kg vs Weight Lb by Carrier Name
widgets.description: Compare total shipment weight in kilograms and pounds grouped by carrier name.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "carrier_name" AS label, CAST(SUM("weight_kg") AS DOUBLE) AS value1, CAST(SUM("weight_lb") AS DOUBLE) AS value2 FROM "t_logistics_shipments" GROUP BY "carrier_name" ORDER BY (value1 + value2) DESC LIMIT 20

widgets.title: Freight Cost Proportion by Carrier Name
widgets.description: Shows the proportion of total freight cost contributed by each carrier name.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "carrier_name" AS label, CAST(SUM("freight_cost") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_logistics_shipments" GROUP BY "carrier_name" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 30

widgets.title: Carrier Name Composition Over Tender Date
widgets.description: Stacked area chart showing the count of shipments over time by carrier name, aggregated by month of tender_date.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT date_trunc('month', "tender_date")::VARCHAR AS x, "carrier_name" AS series, CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_logistics_shipments" GROUP BY x, series ORDER BY x ASC, series ASC
